abstract_en: An early paper demonstrating compact environment models for control.
abstract_zh: 早期展示如何用紧凑环境模型服务控制任务的代表论文。
editorial_summary_zh: 世界模型概念进入主流讨论的起点之一。
editorial_summary_en: One of the foundational papers that popularized the term.
why_it_matters: It gave the field a durable conceptual frame and a memorable name.
